first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core justifications are word-for-word the same. While the lists of strengths and concerns are rephrased and the variant evaluation adds more specific technical terms (e.g., SIMD, MIMD), these are elaborations on the same fundamental skill gaps identified in the baseline. The differences are consistent with normal run-to-run variation in wording and do not reflect any change in the substantive assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on their location.
